title: Extract based on view, not whole board
excerpt: Ability to extract only what is shown in a view, i.e. keeping the filters, sorting etc. on extract. Currently the whole board comes out regardless of view selected.

posts.author: blangt (Bonnie Langtree)
posts.cookedHtml: Ability to extract only what is shown in a view, i.e. keeping the filters, sorting etc. on extract. Currently the whole board comes out regardless of view selected.
